zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian verch Hywel於1205年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾利朗斯時，她的父親Hywel ap Trahaearn36歲，母親Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor29歲。她與Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1235年在英國威爾斯享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian verch Hywel于1205年出生在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾利朗斯时，她的父亲Hywel ap Trahaearn36岁，母亲Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor29岁。她与Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1235年在英国威尔斯享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian verch Hywel was born in 1205, in Llangorse, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Hywel ap Trahaearn, was 36 and her mother, Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, was 29. She married Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1235, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian verch Hywel est née en 1205, à Llangorse, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hywel ap Trahaearn, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1235, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian verch Hywel 1205 in Llangorse, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hywel ap Trahaearn 36 und ihre Mutter Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor 29. Sie hat in Wales, United Kingdom Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1235 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Hywel è nata il nel 1205 nel Llangorse, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hywel ap Trahaearn, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1235, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Hywelが1205年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアランゴルゼで生まれた時，父Hywel ap Trahaearnは36歳，母Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevorは29歳であった。イギリスウェールズでGruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1235年にイギリスウェールズで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Hywel(이)가 1205년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 랭르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hywel ap Trahaearn(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스에서 Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1235년 영국 웨일스에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Hywel nasceu em 1205, em Llangorse, Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hywel ap Trahaearn, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, tinha 29 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian verch Hywel родилась в 1205 г. в местности ллангорс, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hywel ap Trahaearn было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1235 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian verch Hywel nació en 1205, en Llangorse, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Hywel ap Trahaearn, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1235, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
